description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 41 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 19 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment, with an elasticated pocket and a smaller zipped pocketOne earphones gate on the left sideOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches and a key holderOne pocket on the front with a velcro closurePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips with a twill tape design and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and rubber legs at the baseCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
